mapper.update:
INSERT INTO TB_POP ( POP_CD , POP_CNTS , POP_NM , POP_WIDTH , POP_HGT , OPEN_START_DT , OPEN_END_DT , POP_X_LOC , POP_Y_LOC , MENU_SYS_DIV , USE_YN , CRE_USR_CD , CRE_DTM , UPD_USR_CD , UPD_DTM ) VALUES
(
F_COM_UUID_PK()
#{rm.popCd}
, #{rm.popCnts} , #{rm.popNm} , #{rm.popWidth} , #{rm.popHgt} , REPLACE(#{rm.openStartDt},'-','') , REPLACE(#{rm.openEndDt},'-','') , #{rm.popXLoc} , #{rm.popYLoc} , #{rm.menuSysDiv} , #{rm.useYn} , #{ssnUsrCd} , SYSDATE() , #{ssnUsrCd} , SYSDATE() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE POP_CNTS = VALUES(POP_CNTS) , POP_NM = VALUES(POP_NM) , POP_WIDTH = VALUES(POP_WIDTH) , POP_HGT = VALUES(POP_HGT) , OPEN_START_DT = VALUES(OPEN_START_DT) , OPEN_END_DT = VALUES(OPEN_END_DT) , POP_X_LOC = VALUES(POP_X_LOC) , POP_Y_LOC = VALUES(POP_Y_LOC) , MENU_SYS_DIV = VALUES(MENU_SYS_DIV) , USE_YN = VALUES(USE_YN) , UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd} , UPD_DTM = SYSDATE()
